---
title: "Abdelkarim el Ghani<br/>"
subtitle: "<br/>Data Analyst | Neuroscientist<br/><br/><br/>"
format: html
#css: theme.scss
toc: true
#title-block-banner: "images/block-banner.jpeg"
#title-block-banner-color: "white"
#title-block-categories: true
#page-layout: article
header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="_assets/index.css">
resources:
  - _assets/index.css
---



::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
**Welcome to My Portfolio!**\ 
I'm a statistical data analyst at the Erasmus University with a keen interest in neuroscience and pharmacology. My work focuses on data wrangling, analysis, visualization, and creating clear, impactful reports using tools like Quarto.

Explore my [Projects](projects.qmd) to see detailed examples of my work or visit the [About Me](about.qmd) page to learn more about my background and skills.
:::
